title: polygonum arenastrum subsp. calcatum
intro: Polygonum arenastrum subsp. calcatum, also known as bistort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family and is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of bistort include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat digestive issues, and support the immune system. Bistort can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
